note: Analysis plan and decision rule frozen before computation (geo15-style). Thresholds are project-management rules, not preregistered criteria. Seed labels follow the project's date-like naming convention; they are labels, not timestamps.
label: TEST 5 + TEST 7: co-occurrence adversarial worked example and ground-truth grid library
test5: fabricated-and-gridded: x~lognormal(mu=9,sigma=1), N=3000, rounded to nearest 5; run the two-step gate; expected report is grid-compatible -- the gate attributes the ALARM, not the DATA

documented_grid: CES survey vintages (hundreds-grid, value_thousands*1000... stored in thousands with one decimal -> integer hundreds)

flag_rule: GRID-COMPATIBLE iff any residue TV excess over the magnitude-matched uniform null >= 0.05 at m in the modulus set, or g0 > 1; sensitivity = flagged fraction of documented-grid series, specificity = unflagged fraction of non-grid series
null_recipe: uniform integers matched to the series' digit-length histogram, 20 draws, seeded
